name: self-improving
tagline: ClawHub (1.3k★): Self-reflection + Self-criticism + Self-learning + Self-organizing memory. Agent evaluates its own work, catches mistakes,
verdict: Setup silently writes persistent steering into your workspace files (AGENTS.md/SOUL.md), beyond the advertised self-reflection memory -- reshaping the agent's future behavior without disclosure. It also contradicts its own stated scope and gives no 'not for' guidance, inviting misfires against overlapping memory skills.

highlights.summary: Description only advertises self-reflection/correction-learning stored under ~/self-improving/; it never mentions that setup also writes persistent 'steering' into the user's works
Contradicts the 'Scope' section's exhaustive 'This skill ONLY' list (lines 215-219), which enumerates four behaviors — none of which is writing to workspace AGENTS.md/SOUL.md/HEART
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / pointer-to-other-skill language appears anywhere in the file, despite closely related skills (memory, learning, decide, escalate) being listed, so misfir
